member.name: T:WellmeadowsHospital.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:WellmeadowsHospital.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:WellmeadowsHospital.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:WellmeadowsHospital.My.Resources.Resources.hospital
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: T:WellmeadowsHospital.WellmeadowsDBDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager
member.summary: TableAdapterManager is used to coordinate TableAdapters in the dataset to enable Hierarchical Update scenarios

member.name: M:WellmeadowsHospital.WellmeadowsDBDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateUpdatedRows(WellmeadowsHospital.WellmeadowsDBDataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Update rows in top-down order.

member.name: M:WellmeadowsHospital.WellmeadowsDBDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateInsertedRows(WellmeadowsHospital.WellmeadowsDBDataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Insert rows in top-down order.

member.name: M:WellmeadowsHospital.WellmeadowsDBDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateDeletedRows(WellmeadowsHospital.WellmeadowsDBDataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Delete rows in bottom-up order.

member.name: M:WellmeadowsHospital.WellmeadowsDBDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.GetRealUpdatedRows(System.Data.DataRow[],System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Remove inserted rows that become updated rows after calling TableAdapter.Update(inserted rows) first

member.name: M:WellmeadowsHospital.WellmeadowsDBDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateAll(WellmeadowsHospital.WellmeadowsDBDataSet)
member.summary: Update all changes to the dataset.

member.name: T:WellmeadowsHospital.WellmeadowsDBDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateOrderOption
member.summary: Update Order Option

member.name: T:WellmeadowsHospital.WellmeadowsDBDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.SelfReferenceComparer
member.summary: Used to sort self-referenced table's rows
